name: Calendarific
description: List public, local, religious, and observance holidays for a country and year, and look up supported countries.

auth.hint: Create a Calendarific account to get an API key and send it in the api_key query parameter.

tools.name: list_holidays
tools.description: List holidays for a country and year, optionally narrowed by month, day, region, or holiday type.

params.name: country
params.description: ISO-3166 country code, such as US.

params.name: year
params.description: Year to list holidays for; supports historical and future dates through 2049.

params.name: month
params.description: Month from 1 through 12 to narrow results.

params.name: day
params.description: Day from 1 through 31 to narrow results.

params.name: location
params.description: State or region in ISO-3166 format, such as us-ny.

params.name: type
params.description: Holiday category: national, local, religious, or observance.

tools.name: list_countries
tools.description: List countries and ISO codes supported by the holidays endpoint.
